title: The Better Weapons And Tools Mod
description: This Mod adds 10 new materials and three new forms of weapons!
body:
This Mod adds:

New types of weapons like Battle Axes and Paxels for PvP and Hammers for crafting!
New tools for existing ores like copper tools and Emerald tools!
And lots of new ores like:**Tungsten** which has a high knockback resistance but makes you slower, **Rubys** are slightly stronger than diamonds(Fun Fact: the Ruby was originally an idea of mojang that was replaced by Emeralds), **Blueium** which is just blue and stylish, **Titan** which is a little bit stronger than iron, **Platin** which is also slightly better than iron, **Rillardium** which upgrades netherite, **Blackium** which upgrades Rillardium Armor, **Silver** which is stronger than Platin and Tian and **Goldium** which is just absolutly OP, for more variatoin of tools!

Oh... and there's Cheese... whyever.

It changes the fighting system so that you have a cool experiecne.
I hope you'll enjoy my mod and have fun playing and fighting!
